'''Friizt''' was the [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] owner of the gaudy [[Triple Nova Casino]] located in the resort city of [[Le Yer]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A friend of [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[A'jidre Skrigatov]], he worked tirelessly to get the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] re-elected.

{{Char-stub}}
